name: judicial_technology_sensor_fusion_upgrade_lumen_lib_eq
premise: A Judicial Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving judicial technology sensor fusion upgrade lumen lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Inez Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Inez Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Judicial Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Elena Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Elena Ishikawa, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Judicial Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Inez Alvarez must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Inez Alvarez do?
